title: axonopus holochrysus
intro: Axonopus holochrysus is a type of grass or sedge commonly found in tropical regions, particularly in the Americas, and is also known as the 'Yellow Broom Grass'. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Axonopus holochrysus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Axonopus holochrysus typically involve using the plant's leaves and flowers to create teas, infusions, or topical applications for therapeutic purposes.
